task: Implement D5-01 to D5-06: JMS async import-stats pipeline using embedded ActiveMQ Artemis (Spring Boot 4.1.0, Java 26)
acceptanceCriteria: D5-01: spring-boot-starter-artemis and artemis-jakarta-server added to pom.xml; Artemis embedded config present in application.properties
D5-02: JmsQueues.IMPORT_COMPLETED constant defined; ImportCompletedMessage record created with batchId and recordCount
D5-03: ImportEventProducer listens to ImportSucceededEvent via @TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT) and sends JMS message; ExcelImportService publishes ImportSucceededEvent after DB commit
D5-04: ImportEventListener @JmsListener recalculates per-platform ACTIVE post counts; updates ImportStatsCache; re-throws on exception for NAK→DLQ
D5-05: MappingJackson2MessageConverter bean configured (JSON/TextMessage, typeIdPropertyName=_type); DLQ routing via Artemis built-in auto-delivery
D5-06: Integration tests cover happy path, AFTER_COMMIT rollback guard, and DLQ accessibility; all 64 tests pass
blastRadius: All existing tests (64 total) — full suite must still pass
contracts: JMS queue IMPORT_COMPLETED: ImportCompletedMessage JSON over TextMessage
ImportStatsCache.get() returns Optional<ImportStats> — empty until first import
@TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT): no JMS publish on rolled-back transaction
